items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Jim Hacker.
items.explanation: Jim Hacker is strongly linked to Yes Minister.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show NYPD Blue?
items.explanation: Andy Sipowicz is one of the defining characters in NYPD Blue.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Malcolm Tucker.
items.explanation: Malcolm Tucker is strongly linked to The Thick of It.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Saga Noren.
items.explanation: Saga Noren is strongly linked to The Bridge.

items.q: Which tv show features the character Mark Corrigan?
items.explanation: Mark Corrigan is associated with Peep Show.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show MASH?
items.explanation: Hawkeye Pierce is one of the defining characters in MASH.

items.q: The character Number Six appears in Call My Agent!.
items.explanation: Number Six appears in The Prisoner, not Call My Agent!.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Blackadder?
items.explanation: Edmund Blackadder is one of the defining characters in Blackadder.

items.q: The character Maurice Moss appears in The IT Crowd.
items.explanation: Maurice Moss is a key character in The IT Crowd.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Kathryn Janeway.
items.explanation: Kathryn Janeway is strongly linked to Star Trek: Voyager.
